summary: All features verified successfully: 1) RBAC Permissions page shows 78 modules (confirmed in Role Templates tab - Super Administrator and Administrator both show '78 permissions'), 2) User Permissions tab shows '0 of 78 permissions enabled' count, 3) Currency selector on Dashboard works - can change between multiple currencies (INR, USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, JPY, etc.), 4) Currency preference persists in localStorage.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Frontend PERMISSION_MODULES contains 78 unique permission keys (verified via grep count)
Good: Backend /api/permission-modules endpoint returns 78 modules (verified via grep count)
Good: RBAC Permissions page correctly displays '78 permissions' for Super Administrator and Administrator roles
Good: User Permissions tab shows '0 of 78 permissions enabled' counter
Good: Currency selector implemented with Globe icon and dropdown showing all 17 currencies (INR, USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, JPY, CNY, SGD, AUD, CAD, MYR, THB, NPR, BDT, PKR, LKR)
Good: Currency preference properly persisted to localStorage via setDisplayCurrency function
Good: CurrencyContext formatCurrency function correctly formats amounts with proper locale and symbol
context_for_next_testing_agent: Permission module count synced to 78 between frontend and backend. Multi-currency support added to Dashboard with CurrencyContext. Currency preference stored in localStorage under 'displayCurrency' key.

features_tested.rbac_permissions_78_modules: PASSED - Role Templates tab shows '78 permissions' for Super Administrator and Administrator
features_tested.user_permissions_78_count: PASSED - User Permissions tab shows '0 of 78 permissions enabled'
features_tested.currency_selector_dashboard: PASSED - Globe icon button opens dropdown with all currencies
features_tested.currency_dropdown_currencies: PASSED - Dropdown shows INR, USD, EUR, GBP, AED, SAR, JPY and more (17 total)
features_tested.currency_change_updates_display: PASSED - Changing currency shows toast 'Currency changed to US Dollar' and updates symbol
